provider: ChatGPT Windows desktop app and Codex

strategic.purpose: research planning, key technical judgement, evidence review, and final acceptance

support.purpose: bounded extraction, scanning, summarization, and deterministic test work

economy.purpose: mechanical formatting and transformations of already confirmed content

fallback.reason: Sol, Terra, and Luna are available and verified for their assigned project-level routes.
fallback.when_support_or_economy_is_unavailable: return the bounded task to strategic Sol while preserving the documented permission boundary; do not substitute an unverified model
